## Checklist

- [ ] I used repo-relative paths only.
- [ ] I worked on a branch named `agent/task-XXX-task-name`.
- [ ] I created or updated the matching agent result file.
- [ ] I ran the canonical backend test command.
- [ ] I ran the agent result checker.
- [ ] I opened this PR for human review before merge.
- [ ] I did not modify production data.
- [ ] I did not change database schema unless explicitly allowed.
- [ ] I did not modify runtime pipelines unless explicitly allowed.
- [ ] I documented risks and rollback notes.
